About

Bridging insight
and execution.

I'm a Communication Science graduate with a track record of building real things — not just studying them. Over the past two years I've managed P&L across multiple business lines, led teams of up to 39 people, executed national-scale marketing campaigns, and produced creative content that moves audiences.

"I don't see marketing and business as separate disciplines — great marketing is good business thinking, and good business thinking is customer empathy at scale."

My experience spans product strategy, B2B marketing, brand communications, operations management, and creative design. I gravitate toward roles where consumer understanding connects directly with commercial results — and where learning happens fast.

Outside formal roles I'm endlessly curious about consumer behavior: why people choose the brands they choose, and how businesses build the kind of trust that creates loyal customers.

Work That Had Impact

Five projects.
Real results.

01
Product Strategy & Brand
PAKGO Brand Relaunch — Consumer Research to Revenue
BO COGITO · 2024–2025

Identified declining brand appeal in the PAKGO merchandise line. Conducted consumer research to understand buyer motivations, analyzed peer brands, and used findings to redesign brand identity and launch 3 new product lines targeting distinct audience segments. Raised jacket net profit through data-driven pricing strategy benchmarked against competitors.

+21.5%
Net profit growth
3 lines
New products launched
Rp764K
New revenue generated
Research revealed buyers weren't buying merchandise — they were buying identity. Reframing the brand from institutional to aspirational unlocked a new level of consumer connection.
02
Operations & Financial Management
Co-Print Business Turnaround — 39.8% Revenue Growth
BO COGITO · 2024–2025

Took over an underperforming print services business unit. Redesigned operations, cut unnecessary costs by 35%, renegotiated supplier arrangements, and expanded the service offering to attract new customer segments — all while maintaining quality. Built Google Sheets-based P&L and KPI monitoring systems still used today.

+39.8%
Revenue growth
-35%
Operational costs cut
95%
Program success rate
Understanding unit economics before scaling is what made this turnaround work. The fastest path to revenue growth was cutting the right costs first.
03
B2B Marketing · CRM · Campaign Execution
National EdTech Outreach — Building a Marketing Machine from Zero
PT Garuda Cyber Indonesia · Jan–May 2025

No system existed when I joined. I mapped the target market (1,399+ educational institutions), built a CRM pipeline in Google Sheets to track outreach status and engagement at scale, created all outreach materials, executed personalized communications nationwide, and converted leads into 38 face-to-face product presentations. Also organized a 150+ participant webinar as a pipeline-warming event that built brand credibility simultaneously across all active leads.

1,399+
Institutions targeted
1,989+
Personalized outreaches
38
Product presentations
150+
Webinar participants
Personalization at scale is a system design problem, not a contradiction. Building the right CRM structure upfront allowed thousands of messages to each feel individually relevant. Institutions receiving need-specific messages responded; generic messages almost never did.
04
Brand Analytics — Independent Research
Indonesian Beauty Brand Landscape: Social Media & Consumer Positioning Analysis
Independent Study · Wardah · Somethinc · Skintific · MS Glow · 2025

Conducted an independent competitive analysis of four major Indonesian beauty brands — analyzing Instagram engagement rates, TikTok content patterns, brand positioning strategy, and consumer behavior — then synthesized findings into strategic implications for multi-brand beauty platforms.

Brand Positioning Overview
BrandCore PositioningPrimary AudienceTop Content TypeStrategic Value
WardahHalal trust + everyday reliabilityMuslim women, 20–35LifestyleHigh — top SKU driver
SomethincIngredient-first, science-backedSkincare enthusiasts, 18–28TutorialHigh — Gen Z pull
SkintificAffordable efficacyBudget-conscious, 17–25Before/AfterMedium — price-sensitive
MS GlowBeauty transformation, prestige-liteWomen 25–40, tier 2/3Glam/GRWMMedium — own channels
Est. Instagram Engagement Rate*
Somethinc
3.8%
Skintific
3.0%
MS Glow
2.4%
Wardah
1.7%
TikTok Viral Content Triggers
Skin journey
Very High
GRWM/Routine
Very High
Honest review
High
Ingredient dive
High

*Engagement rates estimated via public post analysis and industry benchmarks. For verified data: Ninjalitics.com or Phlanx.com.

Key Finding: All four brands excel at product-level content, but none own the multi-brand, cross-category beauty guidance narrative — a gap that only a platform with a broad multi-brand catalogue could credibly fill. UGC consistently outperforms brand-produced content across all brands in both engagement and conversion.

4 brands
Analyzed
2 platforms
Instagram + TikTok
1 gap
Unowned market territory identified
05
Campaign Concept — Original Strategic Work
"Lebaran Glow-rious" — Celebrating Local Beauty as First Choice, Not Plan B
Original Campaign Concept · Personal Initiative · 2025

Built directly from the brand analysis above, this campaign concept addresses two simultaneous consumer problems: the narrative injustice of local products being labeled as "dupes," and the Lebaran discovery overwhelm of choosing from thousands of beauty SKUs. The campaign uses Indonesia's biggest beauty spending moment to permanently reframe how consumers see local beauty brands.

"Lebaran Glow-rious"

"Bukan dupe. Bukan second choice. Ini pilihanmu."

Lebaran is a moment of pride — Glow-rious combines "glow" (radiant appearance) and "glorious" (full pride). Looking your best at Lebaran with Indonesian local products is not a compromise. It's a proud choice.

The 4 Lebaran Bundles (all categories: skincare · makeup · bodycare · fragrance)
Bundle 01
Full Glam Lebaran 💄
All-out look for Eid day. Full coverage + bold lip + statement fragrance. Rp300K–800K
Bundle 02
Natural Glow Lebaran 🌿
Skincare-forward, light tint, clean scent. Fresh and effortless. Rp150K–400K
Bundle 03
Mudik-Ready Lebaran 🚗
Compact, travel-size, multifunctional. Everything fits in a small bag. Rp100K–300K
Bundle 04
Local Pride Lebaran 🇮🇩
100% local Indonesian brands, premium tier. Proves local can compete with luxury. Rp500K–1.5M
Campaign Architecture
Pillar 1
Reclaim
"Kenali Juaramu" content series — honest side-by-side local vs. imported comparisons. Data-driven, credible, not attacking
Pillar 2
Inspire
#LebaranGlowrious UGC challenge — share your Lebaran look using local Sociolla products. Best looks featured on @Sociolla
Pillar 3
Convert
4 curated bundles live on platform, each with "ini bukan dupe, ini juara" product descriptions that educate while converting
Pillar 4
Celebrate
"Glow-rious Results" — post-Lebaran UGC collection. Campaign extends beyond Eid day because the glow doesn't stop
12-Week Timeline
Week 1–3 · Pre-Ramadan
Reclaim the Narrative
"Kenali Juaramu" content series
4 bundle pages go live
Brief 15 local-brand micro-KOLs
Tease: "Lebaran tahun ini, kamu tampil beda"
Week 4–9 · Ramadan
Build & Activate
#LebaranGlowrious challenge launch
Weekly "Juara Lokal" category spotlight
Bundle promos + early Lebaran push
KOL bundle unboxing content
Week 10–12 · Eid + After
Celebrate & Harvest
H-3 to H+3 Lebaran peak push
"Glow-rious Results" UGC collection
Best looks on @Sociolla
Post-campaign debrief & learnings
Projected Funnel*
👁 Total reach (organic + influencer + existing Sociolla audience)
3M – 5M impressions
📤 #LebaranGlowrious UGC submissions
8,000 – 20,000 posts
🛒 Bundle page visits
120,000 – 200,000 visits
✅ Bundle purchases (est. 5–7% CVR)
6,000 – 14,000 orders
KPIs to Track
Local Brand Lift
% increase in local brand sales during campaign vs. same period last year
Bundle AOV
Avg order value — bundle buyers vs. standard Lebaran shoppers
Narrative Shift
Sentiment ratio: "dupe" vs "juara/pilihan utama" in UGC language
🇮🇩
Narrative no one else has claimed. Every brand says "dukung produk lokal" but no one has dared say "produk lokal tidak perlu jadi dupe siapapun." A multi-brand platform that sells both local and imported is the only entity credible enough to make this claim fairly.
📅
Perfect timing. Lebaran is peak beauty spending in Indonesia — demand already exists. This campaign doesn't create intent, it redirects it toward local brands that deserve more recognition.
🛍️
Full ecosystem activation by design. Each bundle naturally covers skincare, makeup, bodycare, and fragrance — not forced, but because a complete Lebaran glow-up genuinely needs all categories.

*Funnel projections based on industry benchmarks for seasonal beauty campaigns in Indonesia — illustrative estimates.

"Good design serves communication first — not personal aesthetic preference."
